_comment: Client registry for Talentin JPSearch. Add one entry per client here.

_format.client_id: Unique slug used everywhere â€” DuckDB, Qdrant, auth headers
_format.display_name: Human-readable name shown in logs / admin UI
_format.email_domains: List of email domains whose users see ONLY this client's data
_format.email_addresses: Specific emails (overrides domain rule) â€” useful for demos / guest users
_format.password_hash_sha256: SHA-256 of the shared login password for this client (leave null to share the global password)
_format.active: Set false to temporarily disable a client without deleting their data

clients.notes: Default client. All existing pre-migration data belongs here.
